TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Luluna ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 467 buwan, 1,617 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 1,394 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 223 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Luluna hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Luluna hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Luluna hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Luluna hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Luluna hya' ga Sinapalan. tay mkyahu' na Luluna hya' ga Mahavun. tay 'llaw na Luluna hya' ga Halusipun. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ luluna ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku nanto keЕ‹ atu s~Й•inК”ij ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *,*** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, ОІunun **%, tajan *%, amis~Й• *%, pajwan *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran, Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami ru pqniqan iju. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj К”zil na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax kraД§uК”. taj mkjaД§uК” na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa s~Й•inapalan. taj mkjaД§uК” na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa maД§a*un. taj К”llaw na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa Д§alus~Й•ipun. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
S.FORM: alang Luluna ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 467 buwan, 1,617 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 1,394 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 223 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Luluna hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Luluna hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Luluna hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Luluna hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Luluna hya' ga Sinapalan. tay mkyahu' na Luluna hya' ga Mahavun. tay 'llaw na Luluna hya' ga Halusipun. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ luluna ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku nanto keЕ‹ atu s~Й•inК”ij ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *,*** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, ОІunun **%, tajan *%, amis~Й• *%, pajwan *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran, Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami ru pqniqan iju. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj К”zil na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax kraД§uК”. taj mkjaД§uК” na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa s~Й•inapalan. taj mkjaД§uК” na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa maД§a*un. taj К”llaw na luluna Д§jaК” ЙЈa Д§alus~Й•ipun. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
